description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a predominantly white and lavender exterior, accented by large windows and a flat roofline. The interior is visible through the open walls, revealing multiple rooms including a living area, kitchen, bedrooms, and a study, all furnished in a modern style. The front facade is characterized by a prominent entry door and several windows, while the rear showcases a large window and a secondary entrance. The structure is compact, with clean lines and a functional, open-plan design. The use of pastel colors and ample glazing gives the building a bright, airy appearance. The overall form is rectangular, with minimal exterior ornamentation and a focus on practical urban living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with white and lavender walls, large windows, and a flat roof, featuring a compact, open-plan interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several windows, and a glimpse into the living and kitchen areas.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a large window, secondary entrance, and the open-plan living space with visible furnishings.
description_view_2: Side view displaying additional windows and the arrangement of interior rooms, including a study and bedroom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a prominent large window and minimal exterior detailing, showing the back of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and large windows on multiple facades
